description: PR7 — failure capture. A run that raises inside a stage flips status→failed; error_message carries traceback + context; last_stage_seen is the last stage completed before the raise.

expected.last_stage_seen_reflects_progression: authoritative, written by runner at each boundary — not inferred from PR6 stage_ms

notes: Commit 3 test harness will monkey-patch the SA stage to raise a synthetic exception after greedy completes.

Assert last_stage_seen == 'greedy' (the last completed boundary) even though PR6 stage_ms might or might not record SA timing depending on where the raise lands. This proves last_stage_seen is the authoritative progression signal.
